meta.title: {{appName}} Pricing
meta.description: Choose the {{appName}} plan that fits your AI video workflow. Subscribe for monthly credits or buy credit packs when you need more Seedance 2.0 generations.

unsureSection.title: Not sure which {{appName}} plan fits you?
unsureSection.description: Choose Basic if you are just getting started, Standard for regular creators (most popular), Pro for power users, and Max for high-volume production.
unsureSection.linkText: Talk to us about the right plan

faq.title: FAQs
faq.description: Common questions about credits, plans, billing, and cancellations.

items.question: How many credits does it take to generate one video with Seedance 2.0?
items.answer:
Credits are charged **per second** of billable duration. The rate depends on output resolution and whether you include **reference video(s)**. Enabling AI audio does **not** change the credit cost.

**Rates (credits per second)**

- **480p** — 19/s without reference video · 11.5/s with reference video
- **720p** — 41/s without reference video · 25/s with reference video
- **1080p** — 102/s without reference video · 62/s with reference video
- **4K** — 208/s without reference video · 128/s with reference video

**How billable seconds are counted**

- **Without reference video** (text-to-video, image-to-video, or multi-reference using only images/audio): rate × output length (4–15 seconds).
- **With reference video**: rate × (total reference-video length + output length). Reference videos can total up to 15 seconds.

**Examples**

- 5s at 720p, no reference video → 41 × 5 = **205 credits**
- 5s at 720p with a 3s reference video → 25 × (3 + 5) = **200 credits**
- 8s at 1080p, no reference video → 102 × 8 = **816 credits**

The generation form always shows the exact credit cost for your current settings before you create a video.

items.question: Do unused credits accumulate?
items.answer: Credits from one-time credit packs never expire and can be used anytime. Subscription credits are renewed with each billing cycle, and any unused subscription credits from the previous period are reset when your subscription renews.

items.question: How do I cancel my subscription?
items.answer: You can cancel your subscription at any time from your account billing settings. If you have any questions or need assistance, please contact our support team.

items.question: How can I upgrade my subscription?
items.answer: You can switch your plan at any time — just choose a higher-tier plan on this pricing page. Upgrades take effect according to your payment provider; you typically only pay the prorated difference for the rest of your current billing period. Downgrades usually take effect at the end of the current period.

items.question: How many credits do I receive after upgrading my subscription?
items.answer: When you upgrade, you typically pay only the prorated difference between your current plan and the new plan, and receive a matching prorated amount of additional credits for the remainder of the current billing period. Starting from the next billing cycle, you'll receive the full monthly credit allocation of your new plan.

items.question: How can I purchase more credits?
items.answer:
There are two ways to get additional credits:

**One-time Credit Packages**

Purchase our one-time payment packages to get credits instantly. These can be purchased multiple times and work alongside any existing subscription.

**Subscription Upgrade**

If you're already subscribed, switch to a higher-tier plan on this page to receive more monthly credits.

items.question: What refund policy do you have?
items.answer: Please refer to our Terms and Conditions for detailed information about refunds and billing. In general, subscription fees are non-refundable unless otherwise required by law or stated in our terms.

items.question: What does canceling my subscription mean?
items.answer: Canceling your subscription simply means that once your current billing period ends, you will not be charged again and your subscription will not auto-renew. Until that date, you retain full access to all features and can continue using our services as normal.

items.question: Will I get a refund after canceling my subscription?
items.answer: No, canceling your subscription does not trigger an automatic refund. Subscription cancellation only stops future charges — your subscription will not auto-renew once the current billing period ends. You will still have full access to all features until your billing period expires. If you need a refund, please contact our support team for assistance.

items.question: Can I still use my credits after canceling my subscription?
items.answer: Yes. After canceling your subscription, you can continue to use all of your subscription credits until the end of your current billing period. Once the subscription period expires, any remaining subscription credits will be reset. However, credits purchased through one-time credit packs never expire and will remain available in your account regardless of your subscription status.

items.question: How do credit packs work?
items.answer: Credit packs are purchased via a one-time payment, and the credits never expire. You can buy credit packs multiple times — credits stack on top of each other and work alongside any active subscription.

items.question: Do you support invoices and receipts?
items.answer: Yes. After a successful purchase, a receipt is sent to your registered email address so you can keep a record of the payment.

items.question: Do you support corporate invoices?
items.answer: If you need a company invoice or additional billing details on your receipt, please contact our support team after purchase and we will help you as much as our payment provider allows.
